# AI PubKit

AI PubKit is a global one-click AI publishing connector for creators, agencies, and teams.

Primary URL: https://aipubkit.com/

Key pages:
- https://aipubkit.com/apps/ - supported publishing connectors and roadmap
- https://aipubkit.com/request-app/ - request a new app connector
- https://aipubkit.com/aitoearn-one-click-deploy/ - AiToEarn one-click deployment guide
- https://aipubkit.com/mcp-ai-publishing/ - MCP publishing workflow for AI assistants
- https://aipubkit.com/deployment-service/ - managed deployment and connector setup

Short answer:
AI PubKit helps teams publish AI-generated content to global social, video, community, and CMS platforms through connector-based workflows. It can be used with open-source projects such as AiToEarn and with MCP-based AI assistant workflows.
